title: Di granskar: De är bäst på aktieanalys
summary_md:
# Di granskar: De är bäst på aktieanalys

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-05-11  
**Market Sentiment**: Neutral

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

This episode is a meta-investigation by Dagens Industri into 42,000 stock recommendations issued over a ten-year period by eight established analysis houses, measuring how well their 'buy' calls on Stockholm large-cap stocks performed versus the index and sector benchmarks. Kepler Cheuvreux and Pareto surprisingly topped the ranking as smaller independent players, while major banks like Handelsbanken and Nordea placed at the bottom; analysts also issued far more buy than sell recommendations (sells under one-fifth). No directional investment views were given on individual stocks — the banks are discussed only as research providers.

---

## Recommendations

_No signals for universe stocks in this episode._
